overall.description: A first-person walk through a foggy, neon-lit cyberpunk city street at night. The player character moves along sidewalks past digital billboards, vending machines, and palm trees, crossing an intersection at Palm View street. The atmosphere is dense with haze and artificial lighting from street lamps and advertisements, characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077's Night City.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a foggy bridge ramp with a green pedestrian signal. The camera turns onto a sidewalk lined with palm trees and vending machines, walking past scattered pedestrians and debris. The atmosphere is thick with fog and neon lighting from nearby signs.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial stretch with massive glowing digital billboards on the right side. The Fuyutsuki and Mixitup advertisements cast colorful neon light onto the foggy street. Palm trees and vending machines continue along the path while the bridge structure fades behind.

segments.scene_description: Approaching and crossing the Palm View intersection. The camera waits at a red traffic light beneath an overhead signal gantry, then crosses the street with a group of pedestrians. A burning barrel provides flickering light near the crosswalk while cars wait with headlights glowing in the fog.

segments.scene_description: Continuing along a more industrial section of sidewalk with tall metal fencing on the right and concrete barriers on the left. The street narrows as it approaches an overpass structure ahead. Fewer pedestrians are visible in this section, and the lighting becomes dimmer with more shadows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that shifts from a vibrant commercial district into a dim, industrial zone. It begins on a foggy bridge ramp by a green pedestrian signal, moving onto a sidewalk lined with palm trees and vending machines amidst scattered debris. As the camera progresses, the scene opens into a commercial stretch where massive Fuyutsuki and Mixitup digital billboards cast colorful glows through the thick haze. The path then leads to the Palm View intersection, where the camera pauses at a red light beneath a signal gantry before crossing the street past a flickering burning barrel and glowing car headlights. Finally, the environment transitions into a narrower industrial section, moving past tall metal fencing and concrete barriers toward a looming overpass as the lighting fades into deep shadows.
